action.reasoning: Observation: 27 iterations, nav_seek_success=0. Robot gets avg_dist=4.3m, episodes end early. Analysis: Angular velocity sign may be wrong - robot turning away from human. Also too many collisions causing early termination. Decision: Try flipping angular sign, use more conservative approach to avoid collisions, test locally first.
